meta.last_commit: 5341124 feat: GEMA V3.0 bootstrap - edge_worker, cloud_sync, simulator, Docker, CI/CD

rules.name: Sparkplug B Lite — Communication Standard
rules.description: Every MQTT message MUST include the 'node_health' field. Broker LWT is used to detect sensor disconnections (NDEATH).

rules.name: SQLite WAL — Offline Vault
rules.description: SQLite as the local offline vault with PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL. Mandatory for concurrency between edge_worker (writer) and cloud_sync (reader) on the shared volume.

rules.name: Exponential Backoff — Cloud Resilience
rules.description: cloud_sync MUST implement Exponential Backoff for Hasura sync retries.

rules.name: Strict TDD — Gentle Pi
rules.description: No production code without its Test Harness first (Mocks for MQTT and HTTP). Managed by Gentle AI / Gentle Pi.

domains.requirement: Universal JSON Payload — Every MQTT message MUST be valid JSON with node_health (Sparkplug B Lite). Metrics are a dynamic array; each entry has name (string), value (number), timestamp (ISO 8601), MAY have unit (string). No hardcoded metric names.
scenarios: GIVEN edge_worker subscribed to novamex/# WHEN JSON with node_health + 3 metrics THEN insert with status PENDING
GIVEN edge_worker subscribed WHEN JSON with node_health + empty metrics [] THEN insert with PENDING (empty metrics valid)

domains.requirement: Concurrent-safe SQLite — PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL on every connection. Permits concurrent edge_worker writes + cloud_sync reads without SQLITE_BUSY.
scenarios: GIVEN edge_worker writing WHEN cloud_sync simultaneously queries PENDING THEN both succeed, no SQLITE_BUSY

domains.requirement: simulator.py simulates 7 machines across areas, publishing every 10s to novamex/ibarra/{area}/{machine}/{node}. Each client sets LWT so abrupt disconnect emits NDEATH (node_health: OFFLINE).
scenarios: GIVEN simulator.py running WHEN 10s elapse THEN each machine publishes valid JSON with node_health
GIVEN machine connected via MQTT with LWT WHEN disconnect abruptly THEN broker publishes LWT AND edge_worker receives node_health: OFFLINE

domains.requirement: edge_worker subscribes to novamex/#. On each message: (1) validate JSON parseability; (2) validate node_health exists; (3) insert validated with status PENDING. Discards must NOT crash.
scenarios: GIVEN edge_worker subscribed WHEN malformed JSON published THEN discard without crash AND SQLite remains operational
GIVEN edge_worker subscribed WHEN valid JSON without node_health THEN discard without crash AND no INSERT

domains.requirement: cloud_sync polls SQLite for PENDING records, constructs dynamic GraphQL mutation, HTTP POST to Hasura. On 5xx: delay = min(1000 × 2^attempt, 60000). Records stay PENDING until 2xx or max retries.
scenarios: GIVEN cloud_sync finds PENDING record WHEN Hasura responds 200 THEN mark SYNCED
GIVEN cloud_sync finds PENDING record WHEN Hasura responds 500 THEN status stays PENDING AND retry follows min(1000 × 2^attempt, 60000)

design_decisions.context: edge_worker and cloud_sync need NO HTTP server; adding a framework increases attack surface, image size, and startup time on RPi.
Sync API is simpler + 2-3x faster on writes vs async overhead. WAL already handles concurrent read/write.
Poll adds latency but is decoupled and reliable. SQLite NOTIFY hooks are unreliable on WAL.
Single script with dict-driven loop simpler to maintain; per-machine would need supervisor/orchestration.
Internal bridge isolates containers; only Mosquitto 1883 exposed to host. No port leaks from services.
Poll every 60s simpler on RPi; webhook requires exposing endpoint and complicates firewall.

phases.name: Foundation — Infrastructure
tasks: 1.1 Project directory tree: services/edge_worker/, services/cloud_sync/, simulation/, docker/
1.4 docker/docker-compose.yml — 5 services (mosquitto, edge_worker, cloud_sync, simulator, watchtower)

phases.name: Edge Worker — MQTT Ingestion
tasks: 2.3 [GREEN] edge_worker.js — MQTT subscribe, validate(), SQLite INSERT with WAL

phases.name: Cloud Sync — Hasura Upload
tasks: 3.3 [GREEN] cloud_sync.js — 5s poll, GraphQL mutation, Exponential Backoff

phases.name: CI/CD — Multi-Arch Pipeline
tasks: 5.1 .github/workflows/main.yml — test, docker buildx matrix (linux/amd64 + linux/arm64), push to GHCR

verification.result: PASS WITH WARNINGS — 15/15 tests passing, 9/9 spec scenarios COMPLIANT, 6/6 design decisions followed
